Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The kitchen looks spacious and practical, but[n]it seems as though we can't use it yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The kitchen looks ready for use, but[n]there is no sign of it being utilized...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Cooking here with my friends has been one[n]of the great things about living in a dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
